Lyrics.text:
Ry sakaizan’ny tanora!
Zoky be fitia,
Sakambino moramora
Izahay mpania.

Lyrics.label: ref
Lyrics.text:
Tompo ô, arovy
(Tompo, Tompo ô, arovy)
Ny madinikao.
(Tompo ny madinikao)
:,: Aza afoy fa mba tsarovy.
Tano mafy ho Anao :,:
(ho Anao)

Ry sakaizan’ny tanora!
Tsinjonao arỳ
’Zany ady tsy mba mora
Hitanay etỳ.

Ry sakaizan’ny tanora!
Tanonao ’zahay:
He! Fa be ny mapnakora
Raha lavo indray.
